summary: Extract Workbench session, source-run, connection, and runtime job persistence from the public store facade.
rationale: WorkbenchStore is a red-zone BFF persistence boundary. This PR preserves session, requirement review, source-run, source connection, Liepin handoff, and runtime job behavior while moving those responsibilities into focused store modules.
verification: uv run --group dev python -m pytest tests/test_workbench_store_decoupling.py tests/test_workbench_api.py::test_authenticated_session_creation_returns_default_source_cards tests/test_workbench_api.py::test_settings_entry_requires_auth_and_returns_sources -q
